message:
fix: Ctrl+Q and other shortcuts not working on macOS

On macOS, when the terminal sends control characters (ctrl_q, ctrl_c, etc),
normalizeCtrlKey was setting ctrl=false. But shortcuts are defined with
ctrl=true, so they never matched.

Fixed by:
1. Set ctrl=true in normalizeCtrlKey on macOS (control char was sent)
2. Skip shortcut_mod check when shortcut requires ctrl (they're equivalent)
